healthcheck.name: CC10X plugin files are present
healthcheck.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; path = Path('plugins/cc10x/.claude-plugin/plugin.json'); ok = path.exists(); print('ok' if ok else 'missing'); sys.exit(0 if ok else 1)"

scenarios.name: Publication audit passes
scenarios.given: The repo contains the expected plugin, docs, and safety files
scenarios.when: The harness runs the publication audit

scenarios.name: Replay checker passes
scenarios.given: The workflow fixtures and contracts are internally consistent
scenarios.when: The harness replays the deterministic safety fixtures

scenarios.name: Latency audit reads fixture telemetry
scenarios.given: Fixture telemetry is present in the repo
scenarios.when: The harness runs the latency audit against fixtures
scenarios.then: The audit completes without parse errors
